data.body: LANDING: 3/10 leaves closed+signed (ac0e 608, e1f2 609, 74d9 610). e1f2 completion-verifier initially FAILed (AC3's line-based grep defeated by prose line-wrap — phrase 'apply the advisory findings that genuinely improve the plan' present but wrapped in both SKILL.md files); documented wrap-tolerant grep evidence on the ticket, re-closed -> PASSED+signed. 611 (24ec) got a flaky Verified-1: tests/integration/test_store_concurrency.py::test_concurrent_writer_storm_no_loss ('git commit failed: could not parse HEAD' concurrent-writer race) — unrelated to 24ec's diff and PROVEN flaky because 612 (f32e, superset tree above it) passed Verified+MAX. Posted 'recheck' on 611. Holding 612 close until 611 goes green (bottom-up). 613-617 votes still landing. No real BLOCKs.
